name: IFEO — Image File Execution Options
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: IFEO Debugger values redirect execution of named processes to another binary. Used for debugging; abused for accessibility backdoors and process substitution.
forensic_value: Look for Debugger values on accessibility binaries (sethc.exe, utilman.exe) pointing to cmd.exe — creates SYSTEM shell at login screen. Also used to kill AV processes.
